notes: Patient Access API powered by 1upHealth (see https://www.hioscar.com/cms_patient_access_developer_page). No specific Plan-Net FHIR base URL is published; developer page refers to 1upHealth docs. TiC URL is a landing page (state-specific PDFs) not a CMS-schema JSON index. Existing Stedi eligibility adapter in repo uses TAZWT. Oscar also supports PDEX IG STU 2.0.0 per CMS compliance docs.

stedi_hint: ZRSYL (primary payer ID: DEVOT; aliases: 2061, 8196, DEVOTMA)
notes: FHIR verified: GET /fhir/metadata returns CapabilityStatement (HAPI FHIR 6.6.0, FHIR 4.0.1); GET /fhir/Practitioner?_count=1 returns valid searchset with PDEX Plan-Net profile. Supports HealthcareService (21951), Location (72283), InsurancePlan (306), Practitioner. No TiC index URL found publicly; contact interop@devoted.com. Existing Algolia adapter in repo. Patient Access base URL: https://api.prod.devoted.com/fhir.

stedi_hint: CCHPC (aliases: Alignment HealthCare, Citizens Choice Health Plan Fee-for-Service; primary payer ID: AHCA1 also found)
notes: Interoperability page at https://www.alignmenthealth.com/interoperability-apis/ (redirected from /api) but content was not retrievable. No Plan-Net FHIR URL published publicly. No TiC index URL found; check https://www.alignmenthealthplan.com/providers/compliance-information. MA plan operating in CA, AZ, TX, NV.

Small MA HMO (contract H2694 / H1280). Public provider search confirmed accessible without login. No Plan-Net FHIR URL found publicly. No TiC index URL found on eternalhealth.com. CMS enforcement action on record (see https://www.cms.gov/medicare/audits-compliance/part-c-d/part-c-and-part-d-enforcement-actions/eternalhealth-inc). Interoperability page not found.

stedi_hint: A6865 (listed as Gold Kidney of Arizona on Stedi)
notes: ESRD/CKD-focused MA special needs plan in AZ and FL. CMS-compliant APIs hosted by AaNeel Infotech; developer portal at https://developers.aaneelconnect.com/home?payerCode=65457434-4df9-4b6a-b9cf-a15287e60c5a (registration required, FHIR base URL not publicly disclosed). No TiC index JSON found. PDF provider directory available at goldkidney.com.

Developer portal at https://developer.scanhealthplan.com/ (ECONNREFUSED at time of check — may be temporarily down). Covers CA, AZ, NV, NM, TX, WA. No TiC index JSON URL found publicly. Provider search page returned 403. SCAN uses Office Ally clearinghouse as primary; Stedi lists SPSCN. Payer ID 10178 confirmed via SCAN provider documentation.

Developer resources at https://selecthealth.org/developers/resources (403 at fetch time; OAuth 2.0 + FHIR + OpenID Connect referenced). Specific Plan-Net FHIR base URL not published externally. TiC also mirrored at https://transparency.auxiant.com/select-health/ (Auxiant portal). Intermountain Health-affiliated; UT, ID, NV, CO.

stedi_hint: 59274 (primary payer ID: AVMED; also 10067 in some clearinghouse lists)
notes: FHIR URL https://myfhir.avmed.org/provider sourced from AvMed developer page but /metadata returned TLS certificate expired error — endpoint may be stale or migrated. TiC machine-readable files base hosted at Azure blob: https://mrfproddestinationdata.blob.core.windows.net/avmed-mrf-output/ (see developer page for index paths). Find-a-doctor requires member portal login. Florida MA + commercial plan; acquired by Sentara Health 2023.

stedi_hint: ASFL1 (FL) / ASCA1 (CA) / ASMI1 (MI) / ASVA1 (VA) — separate Stedi payer IDs per state
notes: I-SNP / C-SNP / D-SNP Medicare Advantage operator. Interoperability API info at https://www.allyalign.com/interoperability-api/ (AllyConnectApp) and https://alignseniorcare.com/for-members/interoperability-api/. Specific Plan-Net FHIR base URL requires developer registration (contact [email protected], 804-480-1140). Provider portal login-gated. No TiC index URL found.

ACA employer plan (not MA). No Plan-Net FHIR URL found publicly. TiC landing page confirmed at curative.com/transparency-in-coverage-rates (actual MRF index URL behind the page not retrieved). Provider search requires member portal login via health.curative.com. Network search at curative.com/network may allow unauthenticated browsing. TX-focused employer plan.

stedi_hint: 13551 (Stedi ID for EmblemHealth Plan; HIP/EmblemHealth Insurance: 55247; GHI HMO: 25531)
notes: FHIR API requires developer registration at https://prodtzinterop.developer.healthtranzformdev.com/ (HealthTranzform platform); Plan-Net base URL not publicly disclosed. TiC portal confirmed at transparency.emblemhealth.com with in-network file index at /INN. NY-based MA + commercial plan (GHI/HIP legacy). Find-a-doctor confirmed public.

stedi_hint: 52192 (primary payer ID; Healthspring branded Cigna Medicare Advantage)
notes: Healthspring is Cigna's MA brand (rebranded from Cigna-HealthSpring). Cigna Developer Portal at https://developer.cigna.com/docs/service-apis/provider-directory/implementation-guide but registration required; no public Plan-Net FHIR base URL. TiC page live but MRF download links returned errors at time of check. Cigna MRFs also available via https://www.healthplan.org/cigna_mrfs. Provider network validation at hsproviderdatavalidation.com.
